Home Tours Attractions Regions Food & Culture About Contact

Southern Afghanistan

Historic southern heartlands including Kandahar and Helmand, shaped by desert routes and river valleys.

Plan a Visit
Provinces

Provinces of Southern Afghanistan

Helmand

A river-fed desert oasis home to the ancient Qala-e-Bost arch.

Kandahar

The birthplace of the Durrani Empire and the soul of the Pashtun south.

Nimroz

A vast desert frontier of shifting dunes and the Kamal Khan Dam.

Uruzgan

An isolated highland of almond groves and rugged mountain terrain.

Zabul

A historic transit corridor marked by the fortress of Qalat-e Gilzay.

Highlights

Attractions in Southern Afghanistan

Nature & Adventure

Helmand River Landscape

A lush desert lifeline and river oasis.

Helmand

Landmarks

Qala-e-Bost Arch

Iconic Ghaznavid arch and desert citadel.

Helmand

Spiritual & Religious

Tomb of Ahmad Shah Durrani

Shrine of the 'Father of Afghanistan'.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Shrine of Mirwais Hotak

Mausoleum of the Hotaki dynasty's founder.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Baba Wali Shrine

Hillside shrine with Arghandab Valley views.

Kandahar

Spiritual & Religious

Mosque of the Sacred Cloak

The most revered spiritual site in Kandahar.

Kandahar

Ancient Civilizations

Chilzina and the Forty Steps

Ancient rock-cut stairs and royal views.

Kandahar

Urban

Ayno Mina

A model of modern Afghan urbanism.

Kandahar

Landmarks

Nimroz Citadel

A monumental mud-brick desert ruin.

Nimroz

Landmarks

Qala Muhammad

Traditional dwellings of the southwest.

Nimroz

Urban

Kamal Khan Dam

A modern engineering marvel on the Helmand.

Nimroz

Rural

Tarin Kot Surroundings

Rugged valleys and mud-brick villages.

Uruzgan

Rural

Shahjoy & Qalat Valleys

Southern mountain ridges and tribal lands.

Zabul

AfghanTours

Discover the breathtaking landscapes, ancient history, and rich culture of Afghanistan with our expert-guided tours.
